privileged_info_summary: The task defines two chart configurations for AAPL and MSFT using specified technical indicators (SMA, Volume for AAPL; EMA, Bollinger Bands, MACD for MSFT). Data consists of real 502-day OHLCV records from January 3, 2023 to December 31, 2024 in semicolon-delimited format. However, spot-check verification of specific dates reveals discrepancies: AAPL closing price on Jan 3, 2023 is recorded as 125.07 in the data file but web sources report 123.21-123.33; MSFT closing price on Dec 31, 2024 is recorded as 421.50 in the data file but web sources report 418.41-419.20. These discrepancies (2-3%) could indicate data from a different source, adjusted prices, or data quality issues. The data is not synthetic—it represents real historical stock prices, though potentially adjusted or from a non-standard source.
